title: aggregate-stream input spec
description: What to stream: exactly ONE of a single run or a set of parent runs.

run_id.description: Stream a single run's arms. Mutually exclusive with parents.
run_id.title: Run Id

parents.description: Stream a multi-leg run — each parent owns its arm space (the lgbm-leg + xgb-leg progressive table). Mutually exclusive with run_id.
parents.title: Parents

output_dir.description: Override the snapshot directory (default <experiment>/_aggregated/<key>/). The partial metrics_aggregate.json lands here; a stable key lets each call refine the same snapshot.
output_dir.title: Output Dir

force.description: Reserved: re-pull the mirror even if a local one is present.
force.title: Force
